englishDefinitions: (by extension) Characterized by an affected or fantastical manner.
persianTranslation: (بر اساس توسعه) با روشی متاثر یا خارق العاده مشخص می شود.
examples: He wore a jaunty outfit that was all the rage.
He walked down the street with a jaunty swaggering step, as if daring others less perfectly satisfied to intrude upon his good mood.
